The seven asterisms, Abhijit, Sravana, Dhanistha, RohinI,
Jyesfha, Uttara§adha, and Anuradha, constitute Indra's Circle. Its
symptoms are the following : The clouds looking like moving
mountains, sending forth loud peals of thunder, containing flashes
of lightning and resembling in colour buffaloes' horn, swarms of
bees and serpents, will pour down rain. An earthquake occurring
in Indra's Circle will ruin men of celebrated families and castes,
famous persons, kings and heads of corporations. It will also pro-
duce dysentery, swelling of the throat, facial diseases and severe
vomiting. It will cause trouble to the people of Kasi, Yugandhara,
the Pauravas, Kiratas, Klras, Abhisaras, Halas, Madras, Arbudas,
Surastra and Malava countries. It will, however, bring good
